0._value: There is a runaway kid named #p402# in #m10003000#...

1._value: On a lonely building rooftop in #m10003000#, I met a boy named #p402# who ran away from home because of a disagreement with his father, #p202# in #m10001000#. But #p402# has become exhausted from being on the run with no money. Now he wants to return home and try to work things out with his strict, but loving, father. But he wants me to persuade his father not to punish him when he returns home. He also says he wants me to bring the #b#t4031006##k his mother left him when she died as proof that I successfully persuaded his father.

2._value: As #p402# requested, I looked for his father in #m10001000# to get #p402#'s mother's #b#t4031006##k.

0._value: Hey, hear me out. A couple of days ago I ran away from home to get away from my very straight-laced father. So here I am, in #m10003000#, just wandering around. I've spent all the money I secretly took from my dad's safe, and to be honest, I'm sick of this. I shouldn't have run away.

1._value: I don't think my dad will just let me walk back in the door... Not without beating the bejeebus out of me. Can you find a way to calm him down? I need your help, man.

0._value: Thank you! My father is #p202# in #m10001000#. Because he's a man of power, he's strict. He and I just can't get through to each other. My father has a LOUD personality, so you can't be too submissive when you talk to him. I'm sure you'll figure something out.

1._value: To prove you've gotten my father calm enough, ask him for #t4031006#. #t4031006# was my mother's before she passed away. He always said he'd never give it to a guy like me, so if he does... It means he's forgiven me. I'll be waiting!

0._value: You can't do me a favor because I'm an immature kid who ran away from home, right? I understand, but I'm trying to... Ah, nevermind.
Who are you? I don't think we've met.
My father is the chief of #m10001000#. Please convince him to let me come back home. As proof that he's forgiven me, please convince him to give me #t4031006#, which belonged to my mother.
